text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...The truth is, I wanted to get something more
personal and special—something only I could
provide.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Like an epic saga starring a hero that resembles
you, or a cutting-edge training manual, or a
photobook of American landscapes...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
B-but... the more I thought it over, the harder it
was to find the right answer! In the end—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
This weight. The sound of the water. You picked
my favorite kind, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Yes. I heard that you were very particular
about water.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So I tried to pick something close to what you
always drink...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad. I'm sure it's delicious. Thank you, Rob
Roy.
